citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
The IACUC has not reviewed the research facility's program for humane care and use of animals at least once every 6
months as required under the provisions of the Animal Welfare Act (AWA). Program reviews were conducted on April 4,
2025, and December 16, 2025. This timeframe exceeds the 6 months permitted between semiannual program reviews.
Failure to conduct semiannual program reviews within the specified timeframe under the provisions of the AWA prevents
a complete and thorough evaluation of animal care and use. The facility must ensure that semiannual inspections and
program reviews are completed at least once every 6 months. Correct by March 10, 2026.

citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
The IACUC has not inspected the facilities at least once every 6 months as required under the provisions of the AWA.
Inspections were conducted on April 3, 2025, and December 15, 2025. This timeframe exceeds the 6 months permitted
between semiannual facility inspections. Failure to conduct facility inspections within the specified timeframe under the
provisions of the AWA prevents the IACUC from ensuring that facilities are suitable for animals. The facility must ensure
that semiannual inspections are completed at least once every 6 months. Correct by March 10, 2026.

citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
During the review of the semiannual reports to the Institutional Official, it was noted that the IACUC submitted semiannual
reports dated April 4, 2025, and December 16, 2025, an interval that exceeds the required frequency of at least once
every 6 months. Per this Section, one of the functions of the IACUC is to prepare reports of the Committee’s semiannual
evaluations of the program for animal use and its inspection of the facilities; the semiannual reports to the Institutional
Official shall be updated at least once every six months upon completion of the required semiannual evaluations. Failure
to update semiannual reports as required prevents the Institutional Official from being adequately informed of the status of
both the animal use program and the research facilities. Correct by March 10, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.31(c)(1) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
The IACUC has not reviewed the research facility's program for humane care and use of animals at least once every 6 
months as required under the provisions of the Animal Welfare Act (AWA). Program reviews were conducted on April 4, 
2025, and December 16, 2025. This timeframe exceeds the 6 months permitted between semiannual program reviews. 
Failure to conduct semiannual program reviews within the specified timeframe under the provisions of the AWA prevents 
a complete and thorough evaluation of animal care and use. The facility must ensure that semiannual inspections and 
program reviews are completed at least once every 6 months. Correct by March 10, 2026. 
2.31(c)(2) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
The IACUC has not inspected the facilities at least once every 6 months as required under the provisions of the AWA. 
Inspections were conducted on April 3, 2025, and December 15, 2025. This timeframe exceeds the 6 months permitted 
between semiannual facility inspections. Failure to conduct facility inspections within the specified timeframe under the 
provisions of the AWA prevents the IACUC from ensuring that facilities are suitable for animals. The facility must ensure 
that semiannual inspections are completed at least once every 6 months. Correct by March 10, 2026. 
2.31(c)(3) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
During the review of the semiannual reports to the Institutional Official, it was noted that the IACUC submitted semiannual 
reports dated April 4, 2025, and December 16, 2025, an interval that exceeds the required frequency of at least once 
every 6 months. Per this Section, one of the functions of the IACUC is to prepare reports of the Committee’s semiannual 
evaluations of the program for animal use and its inspection of the facilities; the semiannual reports to the Institutional 
Official shall be updated at least once every six months upon completion of the required semiannual evaluations. Failure 
to update semiannual reports as required prevents the Institutional Official from being adequately informed of the status of 
both the animal use program and the research facilities. Correct by March 10, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.

n
